basics.name: Ian Schwarz
basics.label: Customer Success & Operations Executive (B2B SaaS) · Builder
basics.summary: Customer Success & Operations executive turned full-stack builder. Led a 40-person CS organization over a $65M+ ARR enterprise portfolio and drove a 4%→18% EBITDA turnaround; separately solo-designed, built, and launched seven live AI-powered products. Pairs executive operating experience (org leadership, retention/expansion, P&L-adjacent outcomes) with hands-on engineering — rare for either a leadership or a 0→1 founder seat.

work.name: One Journey
work.summary: Embedded CS leadership on a contract basis, owning customer outcomes, retention, and operational process.

work.name: Cendyn
work.summary: Led the Customer Success organization for a B2B SaaS company serving enterprise hospitality clients.
highlights: Led a 40-person Customer Success organization across an enterprise portfolio of $65M+ ARR.
Drove an EBITDA turnaround on the portfolio from 4% to 18%.
Re-tied Customer Success to renewals and net revenue retention, making renewals and expansion predictable.
As a Senior Director earlier, reversed $2.5M in customer churn.

projects.name: Honeybee
projects.description: Free pet microchip registry & health-records platform with AI document extraction, vaccination tracking, and lost-pet chip-scan alerts.

projects.name: DirectGuest
projects.description: The first AI-native hotel distribution channel — routes travelers from AI assistants like Claude and ChatGPT directly to a hotel's own booking site, commission-free.

projects.name: BlackoutPDF
projects.description: In-browser PDF redaction that burns redactions into pixels and strips metadata — documents never leave the user's tab.

projects.name: SureHold
projects.description: Lien-waiver payment automation for general contractors — payment releases the moment the waiver is signed, across all 50 states.

projects.name: Raiz'd
projects.description: Fundraising operations platform — trackable pitch decks with per-slide analytics, investor CRM, and NDA-gated data rooms.

projects.name: Wallio
projects.description: Digital business cards that live in Apple Wallet and Google Wallet — share by tap or QR, no app required.

projects.name: FeedAnchor
projects.description: Chrome extension that automatically saves LinkedIn posts you pause on, so a feed refresh never costs you content.

meta.note: Earlier roles, exact tenure dates for the current contract, and education are available on request / LinkedIn.
